description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, box-like enclosure with a matte black finish. The front face displays two circular speaker drivers, one larger woofer and one smaller tweeter, both set within a recessed panel. A small, square logo is centered beneath the drivers, adding a subtle branding element. The rear side includes a single circular port, likely for bass reflex or cable connection, while the other sides are plain and unadorned. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, knobs, or control panels. The object appears solid and robust, suitable for placement on a shelf, table, or in an urban environment such as a garage or public space.
description: A matte black, rectangular stereo speaker with two front-facing drivers and a small logo, featuring a minimalist design and a single rear port.
description_view_0: Front view showing two circular speaker drivers and a small square logo beneath them.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, featureless black surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single circular port, likely for bass reflex or cable connection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain and featureless.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, square logo centered below the speaker drivers on the front face; details of the logo are not clearly readable.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker drivers are exposed with visible circular outlines; no traditional grille pattern is present, but the drivers themselves have concentric ring designs.
